3303600.name: Involved Roleplay
3303600.description:
Step into a vast open-world where every player writes their own destiny. Become a police officer, firefighter, mechanic, taxi driver — or carve your own path in a living, breathing city that evolves with its community. Every decision shapes your reputation, your income, and your future.

Purchase houses, run businesses, and expand your influence. Customize your home, manage your company, hire other players, and create a true empire. The economy is player-driven — every item, service, and opportunity comes from real people.

Interact, cooperate, and compete in a seamless online world powered by advanced multiplayer systems. From casual hangouts to high-tension police chases, the city is full of stories waiting to unfold — yours included.

Regular updates bring new jobs, vehicles, interiors, and events. Whether you want to explore, build, or rule — the only limit is your imagination. The city lives even when you’re offline, ensuring your place in an ever-changing world.
3303600.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
